title: On the Bayesian generalized extreme value mixture autoregressive model with adjusted SNR in non-standard actuarial data
author: Lande, Iriawan, et al.

steps.title: Method details
steps.instruction: This study aims to develop a representative GEVMAR model to accurately predict the value of general insurance claim reserves in Indonesia. This section outlines the methodological framework used to construct the GEVMAR model, which employs the Bayesian generalized extreme value type I mixture autoregressive model or GEVMAR (GEV type I) model approach for estimation and prediction.
